reasoning: Walter Reeves is a fringe political figure who ran in the 2021 Atlanta mayoral election and failed to gain significant traction. While he initially filed paperwork or announced an intention to run in the 2025 mayoral race earlier in the year, he did not qualify for the ballot. According to late-August and September 2025 reporting following the qualifying deadline (Aug 19-22), the only candidates to officially qualify to challenge incumbent Mayor Andre Dickens are Helmut Domagalski, Kalema Jackson, and Eddie Andrew Meredith. Since Reeves is not even on the official ballot and lacks any major political backing or write-in campaign momentum against a heavily favored incumbent with a $4M war chest, his chances of winning the mayoral election on November 4, 2025, are virtually zero. I am setting the probability to the minimum allowed value of 0.02.
